body: CUDA.jl v6.1 breaks compatibility with Reactant as it uses a CUDA specific intrinsic. See [here](https://github.com/NumericalEarth/Breeze.jl/pull/670) and [here](https://github.com/JuliaGPU/CUDA.jl/pull/3077).

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

labels.description: all day I dream about MLIR
labels.name: reactant ∇

title: Pin CUDA.jl to v6.0 in tests
